name: fluentd
explanation: Fluentd's monitor_agent plugin exposes a single canonical JSON endpoint at `/api/plugins.json` on the conventional port 24220. The check makes an unauthenticated HTTP GET against this URL; no credentials, tokens, or per-deployment paths are required. Auto-config can probe `http://%%host%%:24220/api/plugins.json` and validate the JSON shape (top-level `plugins` array).
notes: monitor_agent must be enabled in the Fluentd config; if it isn't, the port simply won't respond and discovery falls through cleanly.
